allow: Bash(python -c "from app.database import SessionLocal; from app.models.user import User; from app.models.institution import Institution; db = SessionLocal\(\); insts = db.query\(Institution\).all\(\); users = db.query\(User\).all\(\); print\('INSTITUTIONS:', [\(i.id, i.name, i.slug\) for i in insts]\); print\('USERS:', [\(u.id, u.username, u.email, u.role, u.institution_id, 'firebase' if u.hashed_password == 'firebase-managed' else 'local-pw'\) for u in users]\)")
